name: Oatmeal Scotchies
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Vanilla extract or grated Orange peel
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon; set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract or orange peel until creamy.
Gradually add the flour mixture into the butter mixture.
Stir in oats and butterscotch flavored morsels.
Drop by measuring tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 7-8 minutes for chewier cookies; 9-10 minutes for crisper cookies.
Variation: OATMEAL SCOTCHIE PAN COOKIE
Preheat oven to 375°F. Spread the dough into a greased baking pan with dimensions of 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1 inch.
Bake for 18-22 minutes or until very lightly browned.
Cool completely.
Cut into thirty-five 2-inch squares.
